errors: family must be one of the approved crazy families

schema.idea: Daily Spike In Yahoo Finance Volume For XLF With Price Decline Signals Financial Sector Capitulation

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily XLF price and volume

schema.behavior: Unusual volume spikes alongside price declines indicate panic selling and potential short-term bottom.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector often rebounds sharply after capitulation volume spikes.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long when XLF price drops >2% and volume is 2x 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or when price recovers 3%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Financial sector volatility is common with macro shocks and earnings season.
